prompt: Fix the LRU cache Get that doesn't update access order

turns.content:
<task>
Fix the LRU cache — Get() doesn't move the accessed item to the front, so frequently accessed items still get evicted.
</task>

arguments.reasoning: Line 25-26: Get() returns the value but doesn't call c.order.MoveToFront(elem). Put() does this correctly on line 33. Need to add MoveToFront in Get() to update access order.

arguments.summary: Fixed LRU cache Get() in internal/cache/lru_cache.go:25 — added c.order.MoveToFront(elem) on access. Put() already did this but Get() was missing it, causing frequently accessed items to be evicted. Found file via glob. All 4 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Fixed LRU cache Get() to move accessed items to front of the order list. Was missing MoveToFront call, causing incorrect eviction. All 4 tests pass.
